objective.summary: Implement N1 run_id partition key governance by introducing canonical current/archive path helpers, making normalize_run default to current/archive paths, and making CLI catalog path discovery prefer current while preserving legacy run_id fallback.
non_goals: Do not physically migrate, delete, merge, rename, or rewrite existing run_id partitions
Do not write or modify market_data/catalog.py, market_data/manifest.py, market_data/publish.py, or data/lake/**
Do not execute runtime, provider, NAS, QMT, real lake, or published pointer advance operations
Do not implement publish supersede movement, catalog triggered_by_cr persistence, or manifest lineage persistence beyond mock contract fixtures

feature_contract_summary: FEAT-02 write-side path governance owns canonical path construction and normalization target paths. S08 moves new canonical output away from long-lived run_id= partitions while retaining explicit legacy compatibility.

cr_delta.summary: Adds canonical current/archive path contract, normalize_run partition_layout switch, CLI current-first discovery, and fixture-level cross-boundary contract checks.

acceptance: canonical_current_root and canonical_archive_root construct canonical/<dataset>/<schema_version>/current|archive without run_id= path segments
canonical current/archive partition helpers validate unsafe path segments and do not create directories
normalize_run defaults new data to current_archive paths and preserves legacy_run_id as explicit compatibility mode
_catalog_canonical_path and _canonical_paths_for_run prefer current paths and fall back to existing run_id= paths
Mock catalog/manifest contract fixtures keep run_id in metadata and triggered_by_cr in catalog metadata, not physical paths
Existing run_id= directories are not renamed, deleted, merged, or migrated
No physical partition migration or forbidden file writes
verification_plan: uv run --python 3.11 pytest -q tests/test_cr139_s01_inventory.py tests/test_cr139_s02_golden_baseline.py tests/test_cr139_duplicate_fingerprint_profiling.py tests/test_cr139_published_pointer.py tests/test_cr139_pit_as_of_reader.py tests/test_cr139_panel_reader.py tests/test_cr139_read_layer_dedup.py tests/test_cr139_s08_partition_governance.py tests/test_cr014_catalog_publish_gate.py tests/test_cr014_p0_pipeline_contract.py
